message:
feat(workflows/handlers): tick 219 HandleClaudeCodeLimits::execute_step_cx override (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Sixth per-impl Workflow migration. Cleanest of the "policy dispatch"
family — no cass calls, no private lookup helper. Just 3 steps:
(guard checks, cooldown read, classify + audit write).

Routes through cx-first siblings:
- Step 0: Pure guard checks — no async; pre-step cx.checkpoint() only
- Step 1: `storage.get_audit_actions_with_cx(cx, query)` (cooldown)
- Step 2: `storage.record_audit_action_with_cx(cx, audit)` (audit write)

Legacy `execute_step` preserved verbatim.

Tracing annotation: `explicit_cx = true` on info/warn/debug/error spans.

Verification: 1168 / 1168 workflows:: tests pass under
--features asupersync-runtime via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang,
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Per-impl Workflow migration progress: 6/8+ handlers.rs impls:
- ✅ HandleSessionEnd (tick 214)
- ✅ HandleSessionStartContext (tick 215)
- ✅ HandleOnErrorCassSearch (tick 216)
- ✅ HandleSwarmLearningIndex (tick 217)
- ✅ HandleAuthRequired (tick 218)
- ✅ HandleClaudeCodeLimits (this, tick 219)
- HandleGeminiQuota (next — similar shape)
- HandleProcessTriageLifecycle (most complex)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
